case_title: JONES-TOBIAS, ROSEMARY vs. MULLANE, JR., JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL DELAY NOTICE RETURNED. ADDRESS IS NOT PLAINTIFF'S ADDRESS. IT IS A HOSPITAL. THE HOSPTITAL CALLED TO SAY THE PLAINTIFF DID NOT LIVE THERE, WORK THERE, NOR WAS SHE A PATIENT THERE.
